name: Product Hunt launches
notes: Use official or permitted public routes. Treat launch comments and claims as unverified until corroborated.

name: Y Combinator company directory
notes: Use public company pages. Funding and batch status can be treated as source-backed when present.

name: Hacker News Launch HN
notes: Use HN search/API where permitted. Community response is signal, not proof of traction.

name: GitHub trending repositories
notes: Repository activity can support developer-interest signals but does not equal revenue or company formation.

name: TechCrunch startup coverage
notes: Use RSS when available and keep article facts separate from model inferences.

name: SEC Form D filings
notes: Useful for financing signals, but filing details should not be overinterpreted.

name: Accelerator batch pages
notes: Batch pages can confirm participation and company descriptions.

name: Manual URL upload
notes: User-provided company sites, press releases, investor updates, and founder posts.
